full_text:
Zhang Xin (Jingrang) 張歆 (敬讓)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Xin (張歆), styledJingrang (敬讓), was born in Xiuwu county, Henei commandery. An excellency during the reign of Emperor Huan. Zhang Xin was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
